overall_analysis.frequency_distribution_range: Energy mainly concentrates between 0.0 Hz and 0.2 Hz with no significant dominant frequency beyond this range.
overall_analysis.time_stability: Frequency components remain stable over time without sudden changes, suggesting a consistent signal.
overall_analysis.energy_distribution_pattern: Overall energy is not uniform; significant energy level is concentrated between time windows 320 and 420. The color intensity changes do not follow an observable periodic pattern.
overall_analysis.periodicity: No obvious repeating stripe pattern is observed which indicates a lack of periodic signals and minimal frequency change speed.

local_analysis.high_energy_regions: High-energy regions are distributed between 320 and 420 seconds within the frequency range of 0.0 Hz to 0.2 Hz.
local_analysis.short_term_high_frequency_burst: No short-term high-frequency energy bursts observed.
local_analysis.abnormal_frequency_spectra_at_edges: No abnormal high-frequency energy at the edges indicating truncation effects.
